# Eagle Revolution

> Veteran-owned exterior remodeling contractor based in O'Fallon, Missouri, specializing in roofing, siding, windows, doors, decks, gutters, and full home exterior improvements. Founded by Brandon Anderson, a U.S. Army veteran. 25+ years of combined experience, licensed, bonded, and insured, with a 50-year warranty.

Eagle Revolution serves homeowners and commercial property owners across the greater St. Louis, Missouri metro area and the Metro East region of Illinois, including St. Louis, St. Charles, Jefferson, and Franklin Counties in Missouri, and St. Clair, Monroe, and Madison Counties in Illinois. The company positions itself around transparency, craftsmanship, and veteran-led discipline in an industry it says has drifted toward profits over people.

## Company

- [About Us](https://eaglerevolution.com/about-us): Company background, mission, and veteran-owned story
- [Our Team](https://eaglerevolution.com/about-us/our-team): Leadership and team profiles
- [Career](https://eaglerevolution.com/about-us/career): Job openings and hiring
- [Reviews](https://eaglerevolution.com/reviews): Customer testimonials and ratings
- [FAQ](https://eaglerevolution.com/faq): Frequently asked questions
- [Gallery](https://eaglerevolution.com/gallery): Completed project photos
- [Contact Us](https://eaglerevolution.com/contact-us): Free estimate requests and contact information

## Services

- [Services Overview](https://eaglerevolution.com/services): Full list of exterior remodeling services
- [Custom Decks](https://eaglerevolution.com/services/custom-decks): Custom deck design and installation
- [PVC Decking](https://eaglerevolution.com/services/pvc-decking): Waterproof, low-maintenance PVC decking
- [Residential Roofing](https://eaglerevolution.com/services/residential-roofing): Residential roof installation and repair
- [Commercial Roofing](https://eaglerevolution.com/services/commercial-roofing): Flat and commercial roofing systems
- [Windows](https://eaglerevolution.com/services/windows): Energy-efficient window replacement
- [Doors](https://eaglerevolution.com/services/doors): Entry and exterior door installation
- [Gutters & Protection](https://eaglerevolution.com/services/gutters-protection): Seamless gutters and gutter guards
- [Siding, Soffit & Fascia](https://eaglerevolution.com/services/siding-soffit-fascia): Siding and cladding installation
- [Patio Cover](https://eaglerevolution.com/services/patio-cover): Custom patio covers
- [Vinyl & Aluminum Fencing](https://eaglerevolution.com/services/vinyl-and-aluminum-fencing): Fencing installation
